parameters.content:
## Datahub Composer Dags Enrichment
**Purpose:** Receive PagerDuty Dynatrace MCP enrichment webhook and trigger Composer DAG investigation
**Trigger:** Webhook POST from PagerDuty MCP enrichment at `/webhook/datahub-composer-dags-investigate`
**Authentication:** Bearer token header — `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (configured in PagerDuty Web API connection)
**Owner:** CIO DataHub team

### Receive & Validate
Accepts POST from PagerDuty MCP enrichment. Validates Bearer token header and checks payload shape.

### Extract & Route
Parses PagerDuty incident context, extracts DAG names and GCP project info for investigation.

### Respond
Returns 200 OK immediately to PagerDuty so the webhook call doesn't time out.

### Check if DAG Supported
**Get DAG from Table**: Queries n8n Data Table "SRE_Supported_Composer_Dags" by dag_id.
**DAG Support Lookup**: Resolves composer shorthand, sets dag_supported flag.
**IF**: true (Supported/Critical) → left, false (Not Found/Not Supported) → right.

nodes.name: PD: Set Status = SRE Not Supported

parameters.content:
### Update PagerDuty Enrichments
Per branch: PUT /incidents/{id}/custom_fields/values sets **f_status** (SRE Supported/Not Supported), **f_title** (dag_id), **f_rootcause** (SME + Runbook URL). Both set native **priority** (P1/P2 by name, blank → --). **Not-Supported only**: PUT /incidents/{id} sets **urgency=low**. When a runbook exists, post it as a clickable incident **note**. Then responds 200 OK.

parameters.jsCode: const rows = items.map(i => i.json); if (!rows.length) throw new Error('Registry table is empty — run DSC-GCP-DAG-List-Sync-v1 first'); const sorted = [...rows].sort((a,b) => new Date(b.createdAt) - new Date(a.createdAt)); return [{ json: { dag_table_id: sorted[0].dag_table_id } }];

main.node: PD: Set Status = SRE Not Supported
